title: Hologic to Present New Data at ASCO 2026 Demonstrating the Clinical Impact of the Breast Cancer Index Test on Extended Endocrine Therapy Decisions
Hologic to Present New Data at ASCO 2026 Demonstrating the Clinical Impact of the Breast Cancer Index Test on Extended Endocrine Therapy Decisions
Hologic to Present New Data at ASCO 2026 Demonstrating the Clinical Impact of the Breast Cancer Index Test on Extended Endocrine Therapy Decisions
Hologic to Present New Data at ASCO 2026 Demonstrating the Clinical Impact of the Breast Cancer Index Test on Extended Endocrine Therapy Decisions
description: MARLBOROUGH, Mass., May 26, 2026--Hologic, Inc. and its subsidiary, Biotheranostics, Inc., today announced new data demonstrating how the Breast Cancer Index® (BCI™) Test results influence extended endocrine therapy decisions for patients with early-stage, hormone receptor-positive (HR+) breast cancer. According to the latest analysis, physician recommendations for extended endocrine therapy increased by more than 30% among patients identified by the BCI Test as likely to benefit, while recommen
